[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] '''Dasha Fanron''' was an officer serving with the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] who had been given jurisdiction over the [[Ison Trade Corridor/Legends|Ison Corridor]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Fanron was responsible for arresting [[Slar-dan ti Gardi]] after Gardi attempted to bribe the officer.<ref name="WBC" />
